reference: Hi, I am a natural bodybuilder, twenty years old, and I am looking for techniques to increase muscle mass. Do you have any information I could use to my advantage? I have also recently gained interest in myostatin inhibition through follistatin and other methods.
text: Hi, I am a natural bodybuilder, 20 years old, and I am looking for techniques to increase muscle mass. Do you have any information I could use to my advantage? I have also recently gained interest in myostatin inhibition through furley statin and other methods.
